_comment: Sample Claude Code settings for agent-skills-core. Customize the build/typecheck commands for your project. Hooks below: (1) block commits/pushes on main, (2) run typecheck after edits.

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git commit|git push"; then BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Cannot commit/push on $BRANCH. Create a feature branch first." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0'
